aboutData:
I'm an IT professional who enjoys bridging the gap between complex code and great user experiences. Whether I'm building a responsive front-end with React and Tailwind or architecting a back-end with Node.js and MySQL, my goal is always the same: making things work better and faster.

I don't just write code; I look at the big picture—from managing AWS cloud storage to automating workflows with N8n. Having a background in both development and system administration means I'm just as comfortable troubleshooting a network issue as I am designing a UI in Figma. I'm a big believer in continuous learning and love finding elegant solutions to messy technical challenges.
